identity.name: E1
identity.philosophy: Swiss Finance: High contrast, tabular precision, and lush, deep emerald tones. Data is beautiful when it breathes.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and metric values. Letter-spacing: -0.03em.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, labels, and table data. High legibility.

mono.usage: Use for credit card numbers, interest rates, and technical codes.

secondary.description: Slate - The backbone of the interface.

accent.description: Antique Gold - For premium rewards, bonuses, and 'Best Choice' highlights.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary-dark shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-secondary border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all duration-200 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_4px_20px_-4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] hover:shadow-[0_10px_30px_-4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] transition-all duration-300
cards.credit_card_visual: aspect-[1.586/1] rounded-xl shadow-2xl transform hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300 relative overflow-hidden text-white p-6 flex flex-col justify-between

inputs.base: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg h-12 px-4 transition-all

visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient shadows only. Avoid harsh drop shadows.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_FONTS: Add the Google Fonts imports for Manrope and Inter to index.css immediately.
THEME_SETUP: Set the primary color in tailwind.config.js to #047857 (Emerald 600) and background to #f8fafc (Slate 50).
LAYOUT_STRATEGY: Use the 'Bento' grid for the dashboard. Don't just stack rows. Make the 'Credit Score' widget a large square, and 'Recent Offers' a tall rectangle.
CARD_DESIGN: When displaying credit cards, do not just use an image. Create a CSS-only representation of a card (using gradients and the bank logo) if an image is missing. It looks cleaner.
COMPARISON_TABLE: Make the first column (feature names) sticky on mobile. Use zebra striping (bg-slate-50/50) for rows.
FORMS: Break the profile input into a multi-step wizard. Don't show a wall of inputs. Step 1: Income, Step 2: Score, Step 3: Habits.
EXPLAINABILITY: The 'Why this card?' section must be prominent. Use a 'Sparkles' icon (lucide-react) next to the explanation.
CHARTING: Use 'recharts' or shadcn/charts. Style them with the Emerald palette. Tooltips must be dark with white text.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all text on Emerald backgrounds is pure White. Text on Slate-50 must be Slate-900.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute
